data.name: SEX Route 69
data.detailed_description:
Experience a story of a young man escaping the pressures of a life dictated by his mother. With your father's support and a fresh new car he gifts, you decide to go on a cross-country adventure, looking for both personal growth and sexual discovery. As the adventure progresses, you’ll discover iconic American landscapes - remote highways, truck stops, motels, roadside diners and more.

At the beginning of it you meet Carol, a hitchhiker who will become almost like a mentor and an oracle to you, enigmatically appearing and disappearing as the road unfolds. Whether you're making important decisions at crossroads or having fun in adult situations, every moment and episode is designed to immerse you in passion and adventure.

Every bit of the journey has unexpected twists and introduces you to unique situations and characters, like Sherry, a rebellious cowgirl on the run from her father, and Nancy, a biker with a difficult past. Explore carefully crafted locations and environments, feel the wind as you ride the endless roads, charm your fellow travelers and explore them, yourself and the country!

Your decisions will affect you, the hotties you meet, your relationships with them and the overall adventure - unlocking new choices and 18+ scenes as you decide where the road will take you. Ready to get to know what lies at the end of the route? Make sure you are and strap yourself in for an adventure!


Features:
  • Hot 18+ content - enjoy adult animations with various sexy characters as you navigate through the lust on the road.
  • Road-movie - explore America’s highways, from desert canyons to silent motels, each scene attentively designed for a nostalgic yet modern feel.
  • Choices matter - craft your own story by dialogue and meaningful decisions, influencing girls and your relationships with them.
  • Interactive gameplay - drive your car, solve mysteries, and delve into the stories of the girls who cross your path.
  • Beautiful visuals - attentively created 3D graphics and animations that are designed to immerse you into the game even deeper.
  • Easy gameplay - intuitive, nothing too complex - so you can just relax and have a great time 😉

data.short_description: Set out on a journey across America in SEX Route 69 - an adult visual novel finding the perfect balance between romance, adventure, and a road-movie. Start a road trip to explore the country, yourself and beautiful hotties you’ll meet on the way to the end of Route 69 - what secrets does it hold?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macos
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
